prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your financial independence college forward
items: Calculate your exact FIRE number and target date based on your current financial situation
Research and document 5 different FIRE strategies (Lean FIRE, Coast FIRE, Barista FIRE, Fat FIRE, Geographic Arbitrage)
Set up automatic transfers to move 20% of your income into dedicated savings and investment accounts
Open and fund a low-cost index fund account with either Vanguard, Fidelity, or Schwab
Track every expense for one full month using a budgeting app or spreadsheet to establish your baseline spending
Read and summarize 3 foundational FIRE books or blogs to build your knowledge base
